payload.label: fireplace
payload.long_description: Close-up of a black/dark charcoal metal fireplace surround with stepped moulding and a matte finish; the rectangular firebox interior is deep black and recessed, the hearth ledge is visible at the bottom, and the right side of the surround is edge-cropped — approximately 1.0 m from camera.
